translations.vi: Máy bay có thể hạ cánh ở đây.
translations.hu: A repülő itt le tud szállni.
translations.hi: हवाई जहाज़ यहाँ उतर सकता है।
translations.el: Το αεροπλάνο μπορεί να προσγειωθεί εδώ.
translations.ja: 飛行機はここに着陸できます。

tokens.explanation: Definite article; nominative singular neuter; determiners the head noun 'Flugzeug' and marks the subject.
Common noun; neuter; singular; nominative; head of the subject NP.
Modal auxiliary; present tense, 3rd person singular; finite verb in V2 position selecting the bare infinitive 'landen' (ability/possibility).
Deictic adverb of place; modifies the predicate, indicating location.
Lexical verb; bare infinitive complement of the modal 'kann'; denotes the action.

sentences.target: Die Reste landen später im Kühlschrank.

translations.de: Die Reste landen später im Kühlschrank.
translations.en: The leftovers end up in the fridge later.
translations.es: Las sobras van al refrigerador más tarde.
translations.fr: Les restes vont au frigo plus tard.
translations.it: Gli avanzi vanno in frigo più tardi.
translations.ko: 남은 음식은 나중에 냉장고에 넣울 거예요.
translations.pt: As sobras vão para a geladeira mais tarde.
translations.he: נכניס את השאריות למקרר אחר כך.
translations.vi: Đồ ăn thừa lát nữa sẽ bỏ vào tủ lạnh.
translations.nl: De restjes gaan straks de koelkast in.
translations.hu: A maradékot később betesszük a hűtőbe.
translations.hi: बचा हुआ खाना बाद में फ्रिज में रख देंगे।
translations.el: Τα περισσεύματα θα μπουν στο ψυγείο αργότερα.
translations.id: Sisa makanan nanti akan masuk kulkas.
translations.sv: Resterna lägger vi i kylen senare.
translations.ro: Resturile le punem la frigider mai târziu.
translations.ja: 残りはあとで冷蔵庫に入れる。

tokens.explanation: Definite article; nominative plural; determines 'Reste' (subject).
Common noun; plural; nominative; head of the subject NP.
Finite main verb; present tense, 3rd person plural; clausal predicate.
Temporal adverb (comparative form); modifies the clause, indicating time.

Common noun; masculine; singular; dative; object of the preposition 'im' (location).

sentences.target: Der Ball könnte im Nachbargarten landen.

translations.de: Der Ball könnte im Nachbargarten landen.
translations.en: The ball could land in the neighbor's yard.
translations.es: La pelota podría caer en el patio del vecino.
translations.fr: Le ballon pourrait tomber dans le jardin du voisin.
translations.it: La palla potrebbe finire nel giardino del vicino.
translations.ko: 공이 이웃집 마당에 떨어질 수도 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 球可能会落到邻居家的院子里。
translations.yue: 個波可能會跌入鄰居個花園度。
translations.ru: Мяч может упасть во двор соседа.
translations.pt: A bola pode cair no quintal do vizinho.
translations.he: הכדור עלול ליפול לחצר של השכן.
translations.vi: Quả bóng có thể rơi vào sân của nhà hàng xóm.
translations.ar: قد تسقط الكرة في فناء الجار.
translations.nl: De bal kan in de tuin van de buurman belanden.
translations.uk: М’яч може впасти у двір сусіда.
translations.hu: A labda a szomszéd kertjébe eshet.
translations.hi: गेंद पड़ोसी के आँगन में गिर सकती है।
translations.pl: Piłka może wpaść do ogródka sąsiada.
translations.el: Η μπάλα μπορεί να πέσει στην αυλή του γείτονα.
translations.nb: Ballen kan havne i naboens hage.
translations.id: Bola bisa jatuh ke halaman tetangga.
translations.sv: Bollen kan hamna i grannens trädgård.
translations.ro: Mingea ar putea ajunge în curtea vecinului.
translations.cs: Míč by mohl spadnout na sousedovu zahradu.
translations.da: Bolden kan ende i naboens have.
translations.ja: ボールが隣の家の庭に落ちるかもしれない。

tokens.explanation: Definite article; nominative singular masculine; determines 'Ball' (subject).
Common noun; masculine; singular; nominative; head of the subject NP.
Modal auxiliary; Konjunktiv II, 3rd person singular; finite verb in V2 indicating possibility; selects the bare infinitive 'landen'.
Contracted form of 'in dem' (ADP+DET); governs dative; introduces a locative PP.
Common noun; masculine; singular; dative; object of 'im' (location).
Lexical verb; bare infinitive complement of the modal 'könnte'.

sentences.target: Ich will heute nicht auf dem Sofa landen.
sentences.reading: /ɪç vɪl ˈhɔʏ̯tə nɪçt aʊ̯f deːm ˈzoːfa ˈlan.dən/

translations.de: Ich will heute nicht auf dem Sofa landen.
translations.ipa: /ɪç vɪl ˈhɔʏ̯tə nɪçt aʊ̯f deːm ˈzoːfa ˈlan.dən/
translations.en: I don't want to end up on the couch today.
translations.es: Hoy no quiero acabar en el sofá.
translations.fr: Je ne veux pas finir sur le canapé aujourd’hui.
translations.it: Oggi non voglio finire sul divano.
translations.zh-Hans: 我今天不想瘫在沙发上。
translations.yue: 我今日唔想喺梳化度攤住。
translations.ru: Я сегодня не хочу валяться на диване.
translations.pt: Hoje não quero acabar no sofá.
translations.he: אני לא רוצה להישאר על הספה היום.
translations.vi: Hôm nay tôi không muốn nằm ườn trên ghế sofa.
translations.ar: لا أريد أن أبقى على الأريكة اليوم.
translations.nl: Ik wil vandaag niet op de bank belanden.
translations.uk: Я сьогодні не хочу опинитися на дивані.
translations.hu: Ma nem akarok a kanapén kikötni.
translations.hi: मैं आज सोफ़े पर पड़े रहना नहीं चाहता।
translations.pl: Dziś nie chcę skończyć na kanapie.
translations.el: Σήμερα δεν θέλω να καταλήξω στον καναπέ.
translations.nb: Jeg vil ikke ende opp på sofaen i dag.
translations.id: Hari ini aku tidak mau berakhir di sofa.
translations.sv: Jag vill inte hamna i soffan i dag.
translations.ro: Astăzi nu vreau să ajung pe canapea.
translations.da: Jeg vil ikke ende på sofaen i dag.
translations.ja: 今日はソファでぐったりしたくない。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun; 1st person singular; nominative; subject.
Modal auxiliary; present tense, 1st person singular; expresses volition; selects a bare infinitive.
Temporal adverb; modifies the clause.
Negation particle; scopes over the VP (particularly the PP + verb), expressing denial.
Preposition; with static location takes dative; introduces a locative PP.
Definite article; dative singular neuter; determines 'Sofa' as the object of 'auf'.
Common noun; neuter; singular; dative; object of the preposition 'auf' (location).
Lexical verb; bare infinitive complement of the modal 'will'.
